text: Stepping through this modern, quiet hallway into a space dedicated to research and development, I sense a curious intersection between sterility and inspiration. The glass walls are transparent yet also a boundary—inviting me to observe before I enter. Inside, the bold "R+D" and poetic text on the wall beckon deeper thought, reminding me that uncertainty and discovery travel hand in hand. I feel expectant, tinged with introspective calm—a philosopher attracted by the potential of ideas, yet mindful of the sterile, controlled environment that surrounds me. It is a place for quiet minds to spark, and I am ready to listen.
